page_metadata.biotools__summary: Simulation program to generate patterns of single nucleotide polymorphism (SNP) data in a region that is linked to a biallelic site targeted by selection. The software was developed by modifying the commonly used Hudson’s ms simulator
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Simulation program to generate patterns of single nucleotide polymorphism (SNP) data in a region that is linked to a biallelic site targeted by selection. The software was developed by modifying the commonly used Hudson’s ms simulator
